name: Spaghetti Di Napoli
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound skinless boneless chicken breast, cut into strips
1 jar Classico Tomato & Basil Pasta Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large nonstick skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Cook and stir the chicken until it is highly browned.
4. Add the pasta sauce and vegetables to the skillet.
5. Cover; simmer for 10 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
6. Garnish with Parmesan cheese if desired.
